name: Noel Ice Cream Cups
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the softened ice cream, chopped pecans, and halved red and green maraschino cherries.
2. Stir in the vanilla extract, almond extract, and M&Ms until evenly distributed.
3. Spoon the mixture into paper-lined muffin cups, filling each about 3/4 full.
4. Freeze for at least 30 minutes to set.
5. Sprinkle chopped M&Ms over the top of each cup before serving.
